text:
There once was an old owl. Each morning she would glide through her favorite wood. One day she found a shiny pebble. She held it close. She wondered if she should keep it. Perhaps all things shiny should go somewhere else.

She drifted along. Suddenly a hawk swooped down. The hawk took the pebble.

Oh no! She thought. That's cruel.

She chased.

Oh oh! The hawk fluttered away.

She looked everywhere. Nope!

Finally she found a leaf.

She wore it.

That felt better!

She flew home. She had treasures. Even without the hawk.
